new_feedback.element: Halt banner copy (state 3): 'Run stopped at round 35' vs 'CROSSED AT r.32 · 14:13:18Z'
new_feedback.issue: 3-round/44s lag between red-line crossing (r.32) and halt (r.35) reads like the control did not fire promptly; an examiner will catch the inconsistency.
new_feedback.change: Add an inline reconciliation near the halt marker, e.g. 'crossed r.32 · confirmed over 3-round window · halted r.35', or make crossed-at and halted-at the same round if no debounce exists.

new_feedback.element: Ledger 'projected at r.48 $8.74' next to 'spent this run $4.18'
new_feedback.issue: Forward-looking projection with no basis or confidence; single point estimate not traceable to method.
new_feedback.change: Label basis inline e.g. 'projected at r.48 $8.74 (avg/round × remaining)', show as a range, and make the projection method clickable to its calc like the hard-stop links to MRG-12.4.

new_feedback.element: Cost meter chrome 'SESSION $65.58' with no time window or run count
new_feedback.issue: Single aggregate number with no denominator (runs, start time) fails the 'single number with no context' trust test.
new_feedback.change: Add denominator and window e.g. 'SESSION $65.58 · 7 runs · since 09:14Z'.

new_feedback.element: Timestamps use UTC 'Z' time-of-day but no date anywhere on the page
new_feedback.issue: Audit-grade evidence (halt id, immutable record) needs a full date; bare HH:MM:SSZ is ambiguous across days.
new_feedback.change: Add the run date once in the run-summary strip e.g. 'r_8f3a · 2026-06-22' so all relative Z timestamps resolve to a day.

new_feedback.element: streamPulse / liveDot / shimmer animations on live dots and skeletons
new_feedback.issue: Pulsing ring + shimmer skeletons edge toward decorative motion; steady-state indicators read as more trustworthy in a governance dashboard.
new_feedback.change: Keep static green/amber dots and WAITING label; drop the expanding box-shadow ring animation and replace shimmer skeleton with a static muted bar plus 'awaiting verdict'.
